description:
Parent epic: V3 E6: Credential brokering

Source task 4/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add control matching for credential metadata.

Epic closure criteria:
- credential brokering has either a working minimal implementation or a
  deliberately documented interface contract with follow-up issues
- the security invariant is tested: no raw credential values leak

comments.text: Added credential-aware operation control matching through when: [credential: ...], including provider/scope/risk/confirmation predicates and runtime matching against credential refs in context or tool arguments.

title: E6: Add control matching for credential metadata
